instruction:
Deploy the Node-Watch API to port 9081 immediately.

The code exists at:
- `shared/results/node-watch-api/main.py` 
- `shared/results/node-watch-api/database.py`
- `shared/results/node-watch-api/requirements.txt`

Tasks:
1. Read these 3 files from shared/results/node-watch-api/
2. Deploy the API so it runs on http://localhost:9081
3. Use Docker or direct Python deployment - whatever works fastest
4. Verify the API responds to GET /health
5. The API needs to accept POST /api/v1/metrics from monitoring agents

The landing page already promises this API is live. Make it actually live.
